news.title: KCSE Results 2024 - Excellence Achieved
news.excerpt: Our students have demonstrated outstanding academic performance in the 2024 KCSE examinations with a 98% pass rate.
news.content: We are proud to announce that our students have achieved exceptional results in the 2024 KCSE examinations. With a 98% pass rate and several students scoring A grades, Midland High School continues to set the standard for academic excellence in the region. Congratulations to all our students, parents, and dedicated teaching staff.

news.title: New Science Laboratory Opened
news.excerpt: The state-of-the-art science laboratory was officially opened by the Board Chairman.
news.content: We are delighted to announce the opening of our new state-of-the-art science laboratory. Equipped with modern apparatus and facilities, this new lab will enhance our science teaching and learning experience, preparing students for advanced studies and research.

news.title: Pathfinders Club Community Service Initiative
news.excerpt: Pathfinders Club members completed a successful community cleanup exercise in the surrounding areas.
news.content: Our Pathfinders Club members have been actively engaged in community service initiatives. This month, they completed a comprehensive cleanup exercise in partnership with local environmental organizations, demonstrating our commitment to community development and environmental conservation.

news.title: Students Excel in Mathematics Olympiad
news.excerpt: Five students from Midland High School qualified for the national finals of the Mathematics Olympiad.
news.content: We celebrate the achievement of our five students who have qualified for the national finals of the Mathematics Olympiad. This recognition is a testament to their dedication, the quality of our mathematics program, and the support of our dedicated teachers.
